languages.text: "То, что я говорю — факт. Вы застряли во временной аномалии. Каждую петлю вы забываете, что происходило в прошлом".
"What I'm saying is a fact. You are stuck in a temporal anomaly. In each new loop, you forget everything that went before."
languages.original_text: "То, что я говорю — факт. Вы застряли во временной аномалии. Каждую петлю вы забываете, что происходило в прошлом".

traits.locale_text: "What I'm saying is a fact. You are stuck in a temporal anomaly. In each new loop, you forget everything that went before."
"What I'm saying is a fact. You are stuck in a temporal anomaly. In each new loop, you forget everything that went before."
"What I'm saying is a fact. You are stuck in a temporal anomaly. In each new loop, you forget everything that went before."

languages.text: “我说的是事实。你被困在时间异常现象里了。每一轮新循环开始，你都会遗忘之前发生的一切。”
languages.original_text: "What I'm saying is a fact. You are stuck in a temporal anomaly. In each new loop, you forget everything that went before."

traits.locale_text: “我说的是事实。你被困在时间异常现象里了。每一轮新循环开始，你都会遗忘之前发生的一切。”

languages.text: « Vous êtes pris au piège dans une anomalie temporelle, c'est un fait. Chaque fois que la boucle recommence, vous oubliez tout ce qui s'est passé auparavant. »
languages.original_text: "What I'm saying is a fact. You are stuck in a temporal anomaly. In each new loop, you forget everything that went before."

traits.locale_text: « Vous êtes pris au piège dans une anomalie temporelle, c'est un fait. Chaque fois que la boucle recommence, vous oubliez tout ce qui s'est passé auparavant. »

languages.text: "Söylediklerim gerçek. Zamansal bir anomaliye sıkışıp kalmış vaziyettesiniz. Her yeni döngüde daha önce olan biten hiçbir şeyi hatırlamıyorsunuz."
languages.original_text: "What I'm saying is a fact. You are stuck in a temporal anomaly. In each new loop, you forget everything that went before."

traits.locale_text: "Söylediklerim gerçek. Zamansal bir anomaliye sıkışıp kalmış vaziyettesiniz. Her yeni döngüde daha önce olan biten hiçbir şeyi hatırlamıyorsunuz."

languages.text: «Lo que digo es un hecho. Está atrapado en una anomalía temporal. Cada vez que se reinicia el ciclo, olvida todo lo ocurrido en el anterior».
languages.original_text: "What I'm saying is a fact. You are stuck in a temporal anomaly. In each new loop, you forget everything that went before."

traits.locale_text: «Lo que digo es un hecho. Está atrapado en una anomalía temporal. Cada vez que se reinicia el ciclo, olvida todo lo ocurrido en el anterior».

languages.text: "Was ich sage, ist eine Tatsache. Ihr seid in einer Temporalanomalie gefangen. In jeder neuen Schleife vergesst Ihr alles, was geschehen ist."
languages.original_text: "What I'm saying is a fact. You are stuck in a temporal anomaly. In each new loop, you forget everything that went before."

traits.locale_text: "Was ich sage, ist eine Tatsache. Ihr seid in einer Temporalanomalie gefangen. In jeder neuen Schleife vergesst Ihr alles, was geschehen ist."

languages.text: 「私が言っていることは事実です。あなたは時間異常の中にいます。新しいループごとに、前のことがすべて忘れられます。」
languages.original_text: "What I'm saying is a fact. You are stuck in a temporal anomaly. In each new loop, you forget everything that went before."

traits.locale_text: 「私が言っていることは事実です。あなたは時間異常の中にいます。新しいループごとに、前のことがすべて忘れられます。」
